things.name: Registan Square
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage three-sided square of monumental madrassas - the heart of ancient Samarkand

things.name: Gur-e-Amir (Tamerlane's Mausoleum)
things.description: 15th-century tomb of Tamerlane with a ribbed azure dome and jade sarcophagus

things.name: Bibi-Khanym Mosque
things.description: Tamerlane's colossal mosque - once the largest in the Islamic world, now majestically ruined

things.name: Shah-i-Zinda Necropolis
things.description: Avenue of 14 mausoleums with the most dazzling tiled facades in the Islamic world

things.name: Ulugbek Observatory
things.description: 15th-century astronomical observatory of astronomer-king Ulugbek with remarkable accuracy

things.name: Afrasiab Museum
things.description: Museum on the ancient hill-city of Maracanda with 7th-century frescoes

things.name: Samarkand Bazaar
things.description: Silk Road market with the finest Uzbek silk suzanis, ikat robes and dried fruits

things.name: Hazrat-Hizr Mosque
things.description: 19th-century blue-tiled mosque with a terrace overlooking Samarkand and the Registan

things.name: Samarkand Wine Tasting
things.description: Soviet-era winery producing wine since 1868, still making Uzbekistan's best wines

things.name: Paper Mill (Samarkand Paper)
things.description: Demonstration of 2,000-year-old Samarkand paper-making techniques using mulberry bark
